key_themes: Copper production surge and new mine ramp-up (Demirli/Gilar)
Swing to net cash position with strong Q1 sales and inventory build
Transition to copper-focused growth without equity dilution
sources_checked: Company RNS/Investegate announcements and results centre
summary: AAZ reported a major Q1 2026 operational beat with copper production jumping to 3,711 tonnes (nearly 7x YoY), stable gold, higher silver, $45.6m in concentrate/bullion sales, and a $15.4m swing to $17.7m net cash while building $30.8m inventory.[[1]](https://www.tipranks.com/news/company-announcements/anglo-asian-mining-swings-to-net-cash-on-strong-q1-copper-output)[[2]](https://www.proactiveinvestors.com/companies/news/1090579/anglo-asian-mining-sees-copper-volumes-ramp-up-supporting-production-growth-1090579.html)[[3]](https://www.proactiveinvestors.co.uk/companies/news/1090579/anglo-asian-mining-sees-copper-volumes-ramp-up-supporting-production-growth-1090579.html) This follows H1 2025 profitability recovery and the 1Moz GEO milestone, supporting its pivot to a mid-tier copper producer. Historical losses and one skeptical investor view on valuation/transparency and revenue-per-GEO exist, but recent catalysts dominate; biggest risk is execution on the remaining growth pipeline (Xarxar/Garadag) amid commodity volatility.[[4]](https://theoakbloke.substack.com/p/aaz-i-got-skewered)[[5]](https://x.com/BlokeOak57182/status/2044357848323264702)

recent_posts.highlight: Copper volumes ramp-up supporting production growth and strategy execution
Q1 2026 Production and Sales Review – still a Buy? Highlights strong copper, gold output and net cash swing
Questions revenue per GEO (~$2,560) appearing low, production pace vs annual target, and high market cap
Record copper output, swing to net cash, strengthened balance sheet and growth pipeline in Azerbaijan
